title: "podman images list" doesn't behave as documented
body:
**Is this a BUG REPORT or FEATURE REQUEST? (leave only one on its own line)**

/kind bug

**Description**

The manual page for `podman-images` lists the three forms `podman images`, `podman images list`, and `podman images ls`. Nothing in the text mentions the three forms, so the impression one gets is they are equivalent.

However, `podman images` takes any additional non-option argument as an image name. Only images with this tag are listed, and the `list` argument is treated as a tag name. Similarly for `ls`. Nothing in the manual page mentions the option of adding a tag name.

**Steps to reproduce the issue:**

1. `podman images list`

**Describe the results you received:**
A list of all images tagged _list_. (Normally none, except when testing the feature.)

**Describe the results you expected:**
Based on the manual page I would have expected the same output as from `podman images`. The actual behaviour is probably better though, so I would suggest just updating the manual page.

**Additional information you deem important (e.g. issue happens only occasionally):**
`podman images --help` gives correct information.

**Output of `podman version`:**

```
Client:       Podman Engine
Version:      4.1.1
API Version:  4.1.1
Go Version:   go1.18.4
Built:        Fri Jul 22 21:05:59 2022
OS/Arch:      linux/amd64
```

**Output of `podman info`:**


**Package info (e.g. output of `rpm -q podman` or `apt list podman`):**

```
podman-4.1.1-3.fc36.x86_64
```

**Have you tested with the latest version of Podman and have you checked the Podman Troubleshooting Guide? (https://github.com/containers/podman/blob/main/troubleshooting.md)**

Sort of, I checked the [source](https://github.com/containers/podman/blob/main/docs/source/markdown/podman-images.1.md) and the problem is still there.

**Additional environment details (AWS, VirtualBox, physical, etc.):**

comments.body:
The command you are looking for is ‘podman image ls’ - not images, image.
You are calling the ‘podman images’ command with an optional argument as
written.

On Sun, Aug 14, 2022 at 04:03 Göran Uddeborg ***@***.***>

>
> —
> Reply to this email directly, view it on GitHub
> <https://github.com/containers/podman/issues/15309>, or unsubscribe
> <https://github.com/notifications/unsubscribe-auth/AB3AOCEF4C4JRZYARO65CN3VZCR4LANCNFSM56POC7TA>
> .
> You are receiving this because you are subscribed to this thread.Message
> ID: ***@***.***>
>

Right! The manual page actually says `podman image list`. Tricky to document `podman image` on the manual page for `podman images`; it clearly fooled me.

It is still the case though that the manual page does not document the optional argument of the `podman images` command. That part of this report remains valid.
I'm going to tag as documentation given that this is mainly a manpage issue
